column8: I (to finish) reading this articles by 6 o'clock tomorrow.
column10: We (to meet) Simon by next winter.
column11: They (to leave) Moscow by next Friday.
column12: ... I ... (to finish) writing this book by next month?
column13: ... he ... (to get married) by next summer?
column14: ... it ... (to get) colder by next morning?
column15: ... they ... (to leave) their jobs by that time next year?
column16: She (to forget) about her promise in five years.
column17: They (to retire) when their children grow up.
column18: I (not to read) that book by next week.
column19: We (not to find) the replacement for our manager until we provide good perks.
